title: stelis phil-jesupii
intro: Stelis phil-jesupii, also known as the "jesup's stelis", is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central America. As an orchid, it is a type of flowering plant that contains various medicinal properties, primarily found in its roots. The roots of Stelis phil-jesupii have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to their anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the roots are typically dried and processed to create teas, tinctures, or infusions that can be used to harness the medicinal properties and health benefits of this plant.
